summary: Completed PR-14 reorder hardening: category drag now has explicit overlay/placeholder feedback and a dedicated e2e drag-reorder path with feature-flag-aware preflight skip behavior.
how_to_test:
cd apps/web && npm test -- "src/app/(authenticated)/podcasts/podcasts-flows.test.tsx" "src/app/api/podcasts/podcasts-routes.test.ts" "src/__tests__/components/GlobalPlayerFooter.test.tsx"
cd e2e && SKIP_SEED=1 npm test -- tests/podcast-categories.spec.ts --project=chromium
risks: The new e2e drag test skips when podcast routes are disabled (`podcasts_enabled=false`), so full drag persistence verification still requires an environment with podcasts enabled.
